case_title: WFS FINANCIAL, INC. VS HAYWARD, THERESA A. et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY WFS FINANCIAL, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HAYWARD, THERESA A. EFUNGBEMI, ISHMAEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-17-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WFS FINANCIAL, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HAYWARD, THERESA A. EFUNGBEMI, ISHMAEL $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $216.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,716.00, DEFENDANTS HAVE JOINT & SEVERAL LIABILITY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR.
